codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature requirements: AI artifacts and canonical tests were relocated, example.py moved, pytest.ini updated, wrdsfactorexample removed, and transcript/handoff evidence shows pytest tests/ passed at 109 passed and 4 skipped.

sharedStateObservations.observation: cleanup-worker documents .gitignore rewrite and untracking, but does not explicitly require a post-rewrite pass to stage newly-unignored production files; the worker had to discover and add YAML files manually.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/cleanup-worker/SKILL.md steps 5-6; commit f34decdf387a30a18e7ab7691377971d6304ec51 adds examples/ff3_model.yaml, examples/pipeline_specs/*.yaml, src/data/ast/definitions/cross_sectional.yaml, src/data/configs/compustat_annual.yaml; transcript skeleton includes manual `git add examples/ff3_model.yaml examples/pipeline_specs/`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The default test command is not milestone-aware for pre-move states, so workers fall back to dev/ tests before tests/ exists.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml sets `test: ~/conda/envs/jax/bin/pytest tests/ -v`; worker transcript skeleton for session f040cd5f-6831-4d2f-b1fb-787cdf49b847 shows explicit baseline fallback with `~/conda/envs/jax/bin/pytest dev/ -v` before moves.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature-level scope boundaries are ambiguous: cleanup-file-moves description centers on move operations, while the assigned skill directs broader gitignore/untracking cleanup that overlaps cleanup-gitignore-and-state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json cleanup-file-moves description/expectedBehavior vs .factory/skills/cleanup-worker/SKILL.md steps 5-6; commit f34decdf387a30a18e7ab7691377971d6304ec51 includes .gitignore rewrite plus broad untracking/deletions beyond file moves.

summary: Review passed: no blocking or non-blocking code defects found for cleanup-file-moves. Implementation satisfies required behavior; noted shared-state gaps around skill guidance and milestone-aware command/scoping clarity.
